# Jlingz Digital

> Portfolio of Obi Chibueze Vincent, also known as Obi Vincent, a web and product designer and full-stack developer based in Lagos, Nigeria and available for remote work worldwide.

Canonical website: https://www.jlingzdigital.online/
Contact: chibuezeobi.v@gmail.com
Schedule a call: https://calendar.app.google/USmSJ2pT1PmjFqWU8

## Services

- Web design and responsive website development
- Product design and UI/UX design
- Full-stack web development with React, Next.js, JavaScript and Node.js
- Shopify e-commerce design, theme customization and store configuration
- Brand identity, campaign graphics and social media design

## Selected work

### Paysolo

Continuing remote web and campaign design engagement for a European fintech company. Work includes marketing website UI, responsive layouts, campaign direction and social graphics. Financial infrastructure and backend systems are outside this engagement.

- Website: https://paysolo.io/
- Published social content: https://www.instagram.com/paysolo.io/

### Optika Dzani Zaro

End-to-end redesign and implementation of a functioning Shopify e-commerce storefront for an eyewear and eye-care business in Bitola, North Macedonia. Work includes theme customization, Shopify admin configuration, responsive storefront delivery, retail graphics and continuing social content.

- Website: https://optikazaro.mk/

### Matano Complex

Logo identity concept including a monogram, wordmark and presentation applications.

- Case study: https://www.behance.net/gallery/191975403/Matano-complex-Logo

## Profiles

- Behance: https://www.behance.net/lingardobi
- GitHub: https://github.com/obilingard8-ux

## Hiring fit

Obi is relevant for businesses, founders, agencies and product teams seeking a web designer, product designer, Shopify developer or full-stack developer who can handle both interface quality and working implementation.
